indicators.name: checkered floor
indicators.rationale: Checkered flooring is a hard, industrial surface incompatible with a sleep environment.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows prevent natural light and ventilation, essential for sleep.

indicators.name: no curtains
indicators.rationale: No curtains prevent light control and privacy, essential for sleep.

indicators.name: no bed
indicators.rationale: No bed means no horizontal rest surface, essential for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: No furniture means no place to lie down, essential for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuited to sleep (primary). There is no bed, no furniture, no windows, and no curtains, making it impossible to support the primary sleep activity.
